ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "class_rank" INTEGER /* Class/Rank of the player */,
  "club" TEXT /* Name of the club the player represents */,
  "seed" INTEGER /* Seed number of the player in the tournament */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "hand" TEXT /* Dominant hand of the player */,
  "playing_style" TEXT /* Playing style of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the tournament is being held */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "surface" TEXT /* Type of court surface */,
  "prize_money" REAL /* Total prize money for the tournament */,
  "number_of_participants" INTEGER /* Number of players participating in the tournament */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Name of the organizing body */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the tournament's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_brackets" (
  "bracket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bracket */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the bracket belongs to */,
  "bracket_type" TEXT /* Type of bracket (e.g., round-robin, knockout) */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round number in the bracket */,
  "number_of_rounds" INTEGER /* Total number of rounds in the bracket */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the bracket type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bracket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "bracket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bracket the match belongs to */,
  "player1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first player in the match */,
  "player2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second player in the match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date when the match was played */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Time when the match was played */,
  "court_number" INTEGER /* Court number where the match was played */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee who officiated the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_player2_id FOREIGN KEY ("player2_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_bracket_id FOREIGN KEY ("bracket_id") REFERENCES tournament_brackets ("bracket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_player1_id FOREIGN KEY ("player1_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES tournament_officials ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the score belongs to */,
  "player1_score" INTEGER /* Score of the first player in the match */,
  "player2_score" INTEGER /* Score of the second player in the match */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winner of the match */,
  "set1_player1_score" INTEGER /* Score of the first player in the first set */,
  "set1_player2_score" INTEGER /* Score of the second player in the first set */,
  "set2_player1_score" INTEGER /* Score of the first player in the second set */,
  "set2_player2_score" INTEGER /* Score of the second player in the second set */,
  "set3_player1_score" INTEGER /* Score of the first player in the third set */,
  "set3_player2_score" INTEGER /* Score of the second player in the third set */,
  "tiebreak_player1_score" INTEGER /* Tiebreak score of the first player */,
  "tiebreak_player2_score" INTEGER /* Tiebreak score of the second player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_scores_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the statistic belongs to */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins for the player in the tournament */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses for the player in the tournament */,
  "games_won" INTEGER /* Number of games won by the player in the tournament */,
  "games_lost" INTEGER /* Number of games lost by the player in the tournament */,
  "aces" INTEGER /* Number of aces hit by the player */,
  "double_faults" INTEGER /* Number of double faults by the player */,
  "first_serve_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of first serves that landed in */,
  "second_serve_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of second serves that landed in */,
  "break_points_saved" INTEGER /* Number of break points saved by the player */,
  "break_points_converted" INTEGER /* Number of break points converted by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who sustained the injury */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament where the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury sustained */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "recovery_time" INTEGER /* Estimated recovery time in days */,
  "injury_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the coach is associated with */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "coach_email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "coach_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "coach_specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_coaches_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_trainers" (
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainer */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the trainer is associated with */,
  "trainer_name" TEXT /* Name of the trainer */,
  "trainer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the trainer */,
  "trainer_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of training experience */,
  "trainer_specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization of the trainer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_trainers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each official */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the official is associated with */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Name of the official */,
  "official_email" TEXT /* Email address of the official */,
  "official_role" TEXT /* Role of the official */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_officials_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_volunteers" (
  "volunteer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volunteer */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the volunteer is associated with */,
  "volunteer_name" TEXT /* Name of the volunteer */,
  "volunteer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the volunteer */,
  "volunteer_role" TEXT /* Role of the volunteer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volunteer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_volunteers_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the sponsor is associated with */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "sponsor_email" TEXT /* Email address of the sponsor */,
  "sponsor_level" TEXT /* Level of sponsorship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsors_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the venue is associated with */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "venue_address" TEXT /* Address of the venue */,
  "venue_capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the venue */,
  "venue_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venues_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the ticket is associated with */,
  "ticket_type" TEXT /* Type of ticket (e.g., general admission, VIP) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the ticket */,
  "ticket_status" TEXT /* Status of the ticket */,
  "ticket_quantity" INTEGER /* Number of tickets available for each type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "merchandise" (
  "merchandise_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each merchandise item */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the merchandise is associated with */,
  "merchandise_type" TEXT /* Type of merchandise (e.g., t-shirt, hat) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the merchandise */,
  "merchandise_stock" INTEGER /* Number of items in stock */,
  "merchandise_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the merchandise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("merchandise_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_merchandise_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the metric belongs to */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the metric belongs to */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the performance metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_progression" (
  "progression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progression */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the progression belongs to */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round number in the progression */,
  "matchups" TEXT /* Matchups for the round */,
  "progression_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the tournament progression */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_progression_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)
